calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: K. Farnsworth.
Matthew Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kenneth Carver.
Order waiving appearance of Witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Waldron Duggy, Inc. as follows:
Damages $309,944.00
Plus Costs and Interest.
Judgment signed in open court.
